entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Brug disse prompter in Sokratisk undervisning:

entries.source: Use this compact format: Brief read: one sentence. Map update: concise Claim, Assumption, Gap, or Correction bullets as relevant. Next question: exactly one question. For the first reply, use Target, Contract, and First question.
entries.value: Brug denne compact format: Brief read: ett sentence. Kortlegg oppdater: concise Patstand, Assumption, Gap, eller Correction bullets as relevant. Next spørggsmatl: akkurat ett spørggsmatl. Feller første reply, brug Target, Contract, og First spørggsmatl.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Brug denne for skole, partner, CSR, og education access references.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Brug denne loop:

entries.source: Use this mode inside a study workflow.
entries.value: Brug denne tilstand inni en study workflow.

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Brug denne rule: efter any AI explanation, close loop med output fra din own mind. Skriv idé back. Solve en fresh version. Lav en flashcard. Lær bort det at en imaginary younger studerende. Be om en quiz. mer session asks du at produsere, mindre likely du er at fool dig selv.

entries.source: Viva Practice AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Viva-øvelse AI-læringstilstand er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Øv viva, mundtlige eksamener, projektforsvar og hurtige opfølgende spørgsmål med rolig feedback.

entries.source: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: We honeller Do Not Speller signals og ikke track, plant cooAIes, eller brug advertising natr en Do Not Speller browser mechanism er in place. Do Not Speller er en preference du kan set in din web browser at inform websites som du ikke vil ha at be tracked. Du kan enable eller disable Do Not Speller by visiting Preferences eller Innstillinger side of din web browser. If du er under 18 years of age, reside in California, og have en registered konto med en Tjenæste, du have riktig at request removal of unwanted data som du publivecly post on Tjenæstes. At request removal of such data, please contact oss ved at bruge contact informasjon provided below, og inkluder email adresse associated med din konto og en erklæring som du reside in California. We vil lav sure data er ikke publivecly displayed on Tjenæstes, but please be aware som data may ikke be completely eller comprehensively removed fra all vatr systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
